notes: v1.14.109 - Deploy bounce fix PART 2: the rest of the deploy actions now stay in-frame in the New UI. Routed the remaining deploy-cluster container reads through deploy_opsHost() (the v1.14.108 resolver): deploy_confirmDelete, deploy_showAuditLog, deploy_showOpticLedger, deploy_showAcceptance, deploy_completeDeployment, deploy_renderCloseOutModal, closeOut_doPurge, deploy_showTombstone, plus the +NEW deployment flow (mscope_open/loadMaster/confirm/resumeStaged/discardStaged). 14 getElementById('ops-content') -> deploy_opsHost() via a function-scoped pass; in redesign these render into #wk-deploy, in legacy they fall back to #ops-content (byte-identical). Shared #ops-content consumers on the DO-NOT-TOUCH list (handoff_showGenerator/showLog, showOpsTab, manifest/bom/sop, etc.) correctly untouched - the function-scoped bounding stops at them. Now the whole deploy lifecycle (dashboard, list, detail, rack, audit, ledger, acceptance, close-out, tombstone, +NEW) stays inside Work->Deploy. Watch (out of scope): cross-tab buttons (Rack Map/BOM/Manifest via showOpsTab) inside the deploy dashboard still target legacy ops tabs - for the later full pg-sop re-home.
